data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Follow-up reminders for non-signers' as specified in the linked use case. However, there is no evidence provided that demonstrates the implementation or functionality of follow-up reminders for non-signers. The absence of any related evidence indicates a clear gap in meeting this requirement, as the linked use case explicitly states the need for such reminders but does not provide any supporting evidence of their existence or functionality.
gaps: No evidence of follow-up reminders for non-signers functionality.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the follow-up reminders for non-signers requirement.
